essential.name: Python
essential.notes: Use isolated environment. 3.10 is safest baseline for this project.

essential.name: PyTorch
essential.notes: macOS uses CPU/MPS paths. CUDA builds are Linux/NVIDIA specific.

essential.name: Hugging Face Accelerate
essential.notes: Required for project launch patterns and trainer setup.

essential.name: Diffusers and Transformers
essential.notes: Needed for LTX-related model and pipeline components.

optional.name: Weights and Biases
optional.notes: Optional tracking; disable for local-only runs.

optional.name: OpenVid-1M Dataset
optional.notes: Very large storage footprint; enforce preflight disk checks.

optional.name: LTX Video Checkpoints
optional.notes: Match checkpoint generation mode to guidance settings.

experimental.name: LTX-2 Companion Integration
experimental.notes: Treat as separate ecosystem, not a direct replacement of Flowception internals.

experimental.name: Community Quantized/Optimized Forks
experimental.notes: Mark low confidence until validated against current upstream versions.

incompatible.name: Flash Attention on default macOS setups
incompatible.replacement: Use baseline attention paths or supported MPS alternatives.

incompatible.name: NVIDIA Apex on default macOS setups
incompatible.reason: NVIDIA CUDA extension flow does not fit standard macOS environment.
incompatible.replacement: Use native PyTorch optimizers and mixed precision where supported.

autoConfigProfiles.label: macOS Safe Default
autoConfigProfiles.explanation: Starts with the most reliable local path and avoids CUDA-only or heavy dataset assumptions.

autoConfigProfiles.label: OpenVid Sanity Check
autoConfigProfiles.explanation: Runs minimal validation before any long training job.
